## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is useful beyond one private project.
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, tokens, passwords, or credentials are included.
- [ ] No private project notes or personal logs are included.
- [ ] New Markdown files include `created`, `updated`, `language`, and `document_type` metadata when appropriate.
- [ ] Obsidian graph links point to existing files.
- [ ] Project-specific notes use project-prefixed file names.
- [ ] README or docs were updated if behavior changed.

## Notes

Add migration notes, limitations, or follow-up work here.
